title: ortegia hispanica
intro: Ortegia hispanica, also known as Spanish Wort or Spanish Worty, is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ortegia hispanica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in the Mediterranean region. Herbal preparations of Ortegia hispanica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and skin irritations.
